Title: Message body editor exposes unlabeled WebView and unnamed edit field
Input Combos: Events only; Trees only; Events + User Actions; Events + User Actions + Trees
User Impact: A TalkBack user reaches the Gmail compose body area but hears generic announcements instead of a clear message-body label
Recommended Fix: Expose one accessible message body editing control with a persistent name such as Message body and avoid exposing an unlabeled WebView wrapper as the primary target
Verification Step: With TalkBack compose an email and navigate from Subject into the body; focus should identify the field as the message body and editable
Notes: Event 72 Webview announcement; event 82 Editing Edit box; body EditText has empty contentDescription and hint

Title: WebView wrapper disrupts compose focus order before the body field
Input Combos: Events only; Trees only; Events + User Actions; Events + User Actions + Trees
User Impact: Swipe navigation after Subject lands on an unlabeled WebView wrapper instead of the body editor
Recommended Fix: Remove the unlabeled WebView wrapper from TalkBack focus order or route focus directly to the named body editor
Verification Step: Enter a subject then swipe right once with TalkBack; focus should move directly to the message body field
Notes: User action seq 59 and 62 both lead to Webview announcements before body focus

Title: Subject field loses its accessible label after text entry
Input Combos: Events only; Trees only; Events + User Actions; Events + User Actions + Trees
User Impact: The Subject field is labeled before typing but loses its programmatic label after entered text replaces the hint
Recommended Fix: Provide a persistent programmatic label for the Subject EditText rather than relying only on hint text
Verification Step: Type a subject then move away and back; TalkBack should still identify the field as Subject
Notes: Event 57 announces Subject but type events 59-70 show empty label

Title: Sender account value is not announced with the From field
Input Combos: Events only; Trees only; Events + User Actions; Events + User Actions + Trees
User Impact: The From control announces only From and does not include the active sender email address
Recommended Fix: Include the selected sender account in the accessible name or state of the From control
Verification Step: Focus the From control with TalkBack and confirm the current sender account is announced without activation
Notes: Manually observed status is Unconfirmed; verify behavior on real device
